violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface *French Fry Slicer was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface All handles on Reach in coolers were not cleaned as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
